case studies

Projects & case studies

Each one starts from a real operational question and ends in a decision — a deployment strategy, a product fix, or a retention play.

Port 2025 — Present

BigQuery Data Platform Foundation

Built Port's production data platform from zero — warehouse, pipelines, governance, and self-serve BI — as the sole Principal Data Analyst.

0→v1
warehouse built
IoT
telemetry integrated
GDPR
ready by design
Read case study →
Port 2025

Stabilising Early Rider Retention with a Commitment Plan

Modelled an optional 4-week commitment plan to mitigate early churn, with forecasting that showed a path from 26% to 48% K4 retention.

26%→48%
modelled K4 retention
30%
assumed adoption
K0–K4
cohort horizon
Read case study →
Port 2025

De-risking Self-Force-Finish: Abuse vs. Operational Failure

Segmentation that revealed a cluster of Self-Force-Finish events wasn't abuse at all — it was high-value customers signalling a critical GPS/operational failure.

3,000+
SFF events, one site
>25%
high-risk SFF ratio
HVC
true root cause
Read case study →
Port 2025

Optimising IoT Battery-Swap Deployment Strategy

Designed a normalised Swaps/Bike/Week metric to direct battery deployment to the fleets under genuine stress — and surfaced a sensor anomaly in the process.

15.2
swaps/bike/week (top site)
60% SOC
anomaly flagged
fleet pressure
new normalised metric
